glosses.yue: 踩單車嘅人; 單車手

sentences.target: Der Radfahrer klingelt an der Kreuzung.

translations.de: Der Radfahrer klingelt an der Kreuzung.
translations.en: The cyclist rings at the intersection.
translations.es: El ciclista hace sonar el timbre en el cruce.
translations.fr: Le cycliste fait sonner sa sonnette au carrefour.
translations.it: Il ciclista suona il campanello all'incrocio.
translations.ko: 자전거 탄 사람이 교차로에서 벨을 울린다.
translations.pt: O ciclista toca a campainha no cruzamento.
translations.vi: Người đi xe đạp bấm chuông ở ngã tư.
translations.ar: راكب الدراجة يقرع الجرس عند التقاطع.
translations.nl: De fietser geeft een belletje bij het kruispunt.
translations.hi: साइकिल सवार चौराहे पर घंटी बजाता है.
translations.el: Ο ποδηλάτης χτυπάει το κουδούνι στη διασταύρωση.
translations.nb: Sykklisten ringer med bjella i krysset.
translations.da: Cyklisten ringer med klokken i krydset.
translations.ja: 自転車に乗った人が交差点でベルを鳴らす。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; marks the subject noun 'Radfahrer'.
Masculine noun; nominative singular; head of the subject NP; subject of 'klingelt'.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular, present indicative; intransitive; predicate of the clause.
Preposition; governs dative (static location); introduces the PP 'an der Kreuzung'.
Definite article; dative feminine singular; modifies 'Kreuzung' within the PP.
Feminine noun; dative singular; object of the preposition 'an'.

translations.ko: 나는 자전거 탄 사람을 조심해서 앞지른다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我小心地超过那位骑车的人。
translations.yue: 我小心咁超過嗰個單車手。
translations.pt: Eu ultrapasso o ciclista com cuidado.
translations.he: אני עוקף את רוכב האופניים בזהירות.
translations.vi: Tôi vượt người đi xe đạp một cách cẩn thận.
translations.nl: Ik haal de fietser voorzichtig in.
translations.hi: मैं साइकिल सवार को सावधानी से ओवरटेक करता हूँ.
translations.ro: Îl depășesc pe ciclist cu grijă.
translations.ja: 私は自転車の人を慎重に追い抜く。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular; subject of 'überhole'.
Finite main verb; 1st person singular, present indicative; transitive; takes direct object 'den Radfahrer'.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of the direct object 'Radfahrer'.
Masculine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'überhole'.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb 'überhole'; degree: positive.

translations.en: A cyclist is waiting next to me.
translations.es: Un ciclista espera a mi lado.
translations.fr: Un cycliste attend à côté de moi.
translations.it: Un ciclista aspetta accanto a me.
translations.ko: 내 옆에 자전거 탄 사람이 기다리고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 有位骑车的人在我旁边等着。
translations.yue: 有個單車手喺我旁邊等緊。
translations.pt: Um ciclista está esperando ao meu lado.
translations.vi: Có một người đi xe đạp đang đợi bên cạnh tôi.
translations.nl: Er staat een fietser te wachten naast mij.
translations.hi: मेरे बगल में एक साइकिल सवार इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.nb: En syklist venter ved siden av meg.
translations.id: Seorang pesepeda menunggu di sebelah saya.
translations.da: En cyklist venter ved siden af mig.
translations.ja: 私の横で自転車の人が待っている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; governs dative (static); introduces PP with 'mir'.
Personal pronoun; dative singular; complement of the preposition 'Neben'.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular, present indicative; intransitive; predicate; subject is 'ein Radfahrer'.
Indefinite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Masculine noun; nominative singular; subject of 'wartet'.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester grüßt jeden Radfahrer freundlich.

translations.de: Meine Schwester grüßt jeden Radfahrer freundlich.
translations.en: My sister greets every cyclist politely.
translations.es: Mi hermana saluda amablemente a cada ciclista.
translations.fr: Ma sœur salue poliment chaque cycliste.
translations.it: Mia sorella saluta gentilmente ogni ciclista.
translations.ko: 내 여동생은 만나는 자전거 탄 사람마다 친절하게 인사한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹对每位骑车的人都友好地打招呼。
translations.yue: 我妹妹親切咁同每個單車手打招呼。
translations.ru: Моя сестра дружелюбно приветствует каждого велосипедиста.
translations.pt: Minha irmã cumprimenta educadamente cada ciclista.
translations.he: אחותי אומרת שלום בנימוס לכל רוכב אופניים.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim her bisikletliyi nazikçe selamlıyor.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi chào lịch sự mỗi người đi xe đạp.
translations.ar: أختي تحيي كل راكب دراجة بأدب.
translations.nl: Mijn zus groet elke fietser vriendelijk.
translations.uk: Моя сестра ввічливо вітає кожного велосипедиста.
translations.hu: A húgom udvariasan köszönt minden kerékpárost.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन हर साइकिल सवार को विनम्रता से नमस्ते करती है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra uprzejmie wita każdego rowerzystę.
translations.el: Η αδερφή μου χαιρετά ευγενικά κάθε ποδηλάτη.
translations.nb: Min søster hilser høflig på hver syklist.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya menyapa setiap pesepeda dengan sopan.
translations.sv: Min syster hälsar artigt på varje cyklist.
translations.ro: Sora mea salută politicos fiecare ciclist.
translations.cs: Moje sestra zdvořile zdraví kάθe cyklistu.
translations.da: Min søster hilser høfligt på hver cyklist.
translations.ja: 妹は自転車に乗っている人みんなに丁寧にあいさつする。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Schwester' to mark possession.
Feminine noun; nominative singular; subject of 'grüßt'.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular, present indicative; transitive; takes direct object 'jeden Radfahrer'.
Quantifier determiner; accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Radfahrer' as the direct object.
Masculine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'grüßt'.
Adverb of manner; modifies 'grüßt'; degree: positive.
